message:
refactor(scheduler): replace IntrusiveStack with VecDeque and batch worker wakes

Major scheduler rework for simpler, more predictable task scheduling:

LocalQueue:
- Replace IntrusiveStack with VecDeque<TaskId> for the local queue
- Eliminates intrusive linked-list complexity and arena coupling for
  push/pop operations
- push_from_tls now checks contains() to prevent duplicate enqueue
- push_batch simplified to direct VecDeque iteration
- Remove SmallVec and IntrusiveStack imports

Stealer:
- steal() and steal_batch_locked() rewritten for VecDeque storage
- Local (!Send) task filtering now uses indexed iteration with
  arena.get() + is_local() check instead of steal_one_with_locality
- Removes restore_skipped_locals helper and SmallVec buffering
- steal_batch_into_non_local fast path removed (no longer needed)

GlobalInjector:
- Add inject_ready_uncounted() for batched injection without per-task
  atomic increment
- Add add_ready_count() for bulk atomic counter update

WorkerCoordinator:
- Add wake_many() method that wakes N workers in round-robin order,
  avoiding N separate wake_one() calls
- Falls back to wake_all() when num_wakes >= parker count

ThreeLaneWorker:
- wake_dependents_locked batches global injections and uses single
  add_ready_count + wake_many call
- Finalizer wakes similarly batched in task completion paths

Benchmark:
- Add explicit LocalQueue type annotation in benchmark closure

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
